specs.title: cp-000: Page renders as a client component use client
cp-001: All sections visible after data loads
cp-002: Header tabs searchfilter row and project listing all render in order
cp-003: Responsive layout adapts to viewport size
cp-004: Page title displays My Projects
cp-005: Badge next to title shows total project count
cp-006: Badge count updates when projects are added or removed
cp-007: List button with List Phosphor icon
cp-008: Grid button with SquaresFour Phosphor icon
cp-009: Active mode is visually highlighted
cp-010: Clicking toggles between list and grid view modes
cp-011: Selected mode persists during session state-based
cp-012: Displays Plus icon with label New Project
cp-013: Clicking opens the New Project Modal
cp-014: Button visible at all times regardless of project count
cp-015: All four tabs render in a horizontal row
cp-016: Active tab is visually distinguished from inactive tabs
cp-017: Clicking a tab filters the project list to matching types
cp-018: All Projects tab shows every project regardless of type
cp-019: Tab switch is immediate client-side filter no refetch
cp-020: Tab works in combination with search and status filter
cp-021: Switching tabs does not reset the search input or status filter
cp-022: Placeholder text Search projects
cp-023: MagnifyingGlass icon present
cp-024: Typing filters projects by title client-side
cp-025: Clearing the input restores the full filtered list
cp-026: Works in combination with active tab and status filter
cp-027: FunnelSimple icon displayed
cp-028: Default option All Statuses
cp-029: Dropdown lists all five statuses Planning Drafting Reviewing Completed Archived
cp-030: Selecting a status filters projects to that status only
cp-031: Selecting All Statuses removes the status filter
cp-032: Works in combination with active tab and search input
cp-033: Tab Search Status all compound correctly
cp-034: Example Articles tab search crispr status drafting only articles matching crispr
